name: AVERROES
fullName: Apixaban in Patients with Atrial Fibrillation Unsuitable for VKA
teachingPoint: Supports anticoagulation over aspirin for AF stroke prevention; informs ASPIRE rationale.

name: ARTESiA
fullName: Apixaban for Stroke Prevention in Subclinical Atrial Fibrillation
population: n=4012, ≥55, NIHSS n/a, subclinical AF detected on device
teachingPoint: Establishes apixaban benefit even in subclinical AF; informs ICH-survivor decisions.
